name: CandyShoppers AG
description: The company specializes in the buying and selling of candy products in the markets and provides the latest information on candy. Notably, candy has a rich history, originating as a Chinese invention around 600 AD for dried fruits coated in sugar, and has been known by that name in the Western world since the 14th century.

name: Candy Digital
description: Candy is a manufacturer and service provider that specializes in creating innovative non-fungible token (NFT) ecosystems, offering officially licensed digital collectibles for fans and collectors of various cultural icons.

name: SAUDI CHEWING GUM PRODUCTION FACTORY
description: Gandour is a prominent manufacturer in the FMCG sector, well-known for its diverse range of confectionery products, including candy and chewing gum. With a strong distribution network across over 33 markets, the company ensures the availability of its quality offerings in the Middle East, Africa, and beyond.

name: Candy Corner Philippines Inc.
description: Candy Corner is a prominent retailer and distributor of high-quality candies and chocolates in the Philippines, offering over 300 varieties of treats, including popular brands like Wonka and Jelly Belly. With a commitment to introducing unique and exciting confectionery options, Candy Corner provides a diverse selection that caters to candy lovers of all ages.

name: Candy People North America
description: Candy People is a specialist in Scandinavian bulk confectionery, offering a wide variety of candy products, including gummy candies, chocolate bars, and sugar-free options. The company prides itself on using high-quality ingredients and provides custom candy display solutions to enhance sales for resellers.

name: House Of Candy
description: House of Candy is a premier retailer that specializes in a wide variety of imported candies, catering to both children and adults through a unique pick and mix platform. With over 170 locations across India, the company offers an extensive selection of sweets, ensuring a delightful experience for candy enthusiasts.

name: Candy Club
description: Candy Club is a manufacturer and distributor of premium candies, offering a diverse range of unique and delicious confections. Their products, including individual candy cups and subscription services, cater to sweet cravings for both everyday enjoyment and special occasions.

name: Tootsie Roll
description: Tootsie Roll Industries is a prominent candy manufacturer, known for its extensive range of beloved brands such as Tootsie Roll, Tootsie Pop, and Dubble Bubble. With a history dating back to 1896, the company specializes in producing various candy types, including chocolate confections and bubble gum.

name: Spangler Candy
description: Spangler Candy specializes in a diverse array of confectionery products, including well-known brands like Dum Dums, Necco Wafers, and Sweethearts. The company ensures high quality and safety standards in its candy production, offering everything from chewy candies to mints.
